overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 depicting a nighttime walk through a rain-soaked futuristic metropolis. The player character moves along neon-lit streets, passes beneath pedestrian overpasses, and enters a covered urban plaza featuring an indoor garden with a curved glass ceiling.

scene_state.functional_zone: rain-slicked multi-lane street with holographic advertisements

events.description: approaching and entering the covered pedestrian overpass

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the right side of the wet street toward the overpass, observing the neon-lit surroundings

notable_agents.action: car driving past on the left side of the road with headlights on

entered.detail: massive floating advertisement displaying a character with pink hair and Japanese text
elevated walkway with glass windows spanning across the street ahead
bright orange barrier running along the right edge of the walkway
building covered in glowing red and cyan neon signage

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a rain-soaked cyberpunk street at night, with the camera moving forward toward a large holographic billboard and pedestrian overpass. Neon lights reflect off the wet asphalt as vehicles pass by on the left, and the orange safety railing guides the path forward.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered walkway beneath pedestrian overpass with bank signage

events.description: exiting the covered overpass area back into the open rain

agents.ego_description: passing under the overpass while observing the MARMUR BANK signage, then continuing into the open street

entered.detail: illuminated sign with white and red lettering reading MARMUR BANK
dark metal and glass structure overhead providing shelter from rain

segments.scene_description: The camera moves beneath the pedestrian overpass where the MARMUR BANK sign is prominently displayed on the right. The environment transitions from exposed rain to sheltered cover, then back to open air as the camera exits the overpass structure.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban street lined with yellow structural pillars and neon advertisements

events.description: slowing slightly while approaching the intersection with crosswalk

agents.ego_description: walking along the street passing distinctive yellow pillars, approaching an intersection with traffic signals

notable_agents.action: white van driving ahead on the left side of the road

entered.detail: series of bright yellow structural columns supporting the building overhang
pedestrian crossing signal with illuminated walk sign

segments.scene_description: Moving along the open street with distinctive yellow support pillars on the right, the camera approaches an intersection. A white van drives ahead on the left while neon signs illuminate the rain-soaked buildings. The pedestrian signal indicates it is safe to cross ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: intersection with crosswalk leading to covered plaza entrance

events.description: turning right and entering the covered plaza with glass ceiling
transitioning from outdoor neon lighting to interior cyan lighting of the plaza

agents.ego_description: turning right at the intersection and entering the covered plaza area, transitioning from street to indoor garden space

notable_agents.action: white truck waiting at the intersection on the right side

entered.detail: broad yellow and black striped pedestrian crossing marking the intersection
large arched entrance leading into the indoor plaza with visible greenery inside
transparent curved roof structure with cyan neon lighting strips
mature trees growing inside the covered plaza area

segments.scene_description: At the intersection, the camera turns right across the yellow-striped crosswalk, passing a waiting truck. The scene transitions dramatically as the camera enters a futuristic covered plaza with a curved glass ceiling and indoor trees, shifting from outdoor street to sheltered garden environment.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic indoor garden plaza with curved glass ceiling and cyan lighting

events.description: camera tilts upward to view the curved glass ceiling and lighting fixtures

agents.ego_description: walking through the indoor plaza, briefly looking up at the curved ceiling structure before continuing forward

entered.detail: rows of bright cyan fluorescent lights running along the curved ceiling
rectangular sections of green grass with white neon borders
glowing red and pink digital billboards on the left wall displaying product ads

segments.scene_description: The final segment explores the serene indoor garden plaza with its distinctive curved glass ceiling illuminated by cyan linear lights. The camera moves past manicured grass patches and indoor trees, with holographic advertisements visible on the left wall, creating a peaceful contrast to the busy street outside.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a rain-drenched cyberpunk street into a serene, sheltered indoor garden plaza. It begins by moving forward along wet asphalt reflecting neon lights, guided by an orange safety railing toward a holographic billboard and a pedestrian overpass. As the camera passes beneath the overpass and the Marmur Bank sign, the environment briefly shifts from the open rain to sheltered cover before returning to the street, where yellow support pillars and passing vehicles lead toward a city intersection. The scene then transitions as the camera turns right across a yellow-striped crosswalk, moving from the chaotic outdoor elements into a futuristic plaza beneath a curved glass ceiling. Finally, the movement slows within the indoor garden, gliding past manicured grass and trees illuminated by cyan linear lights and holographic advertisements.
